pending.body: In `rebuild_planned_elsewhere_from_journal` (service.rs ~L2440-2512), the doc comment says 'keeping the latest (newest `recorded_at`) row for each key' but the code uses unconditional `HashMap::insert` without comparing timestamps. This is only correct because journal events are append-only (chronologically ordered). If the journal were ever reordered (e.g., by a future merge/compaction tool), the last-writer-wins semantic would silently produce wrong results. Either add a timestamp guard (`if mapping.recorded_at >= existing.recorded_at`) or update the doc comment to say 'keeping the last journal entry for each key (relies on append-only ordering)' so the invariant is explicit.

src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:7617-7626 validates `mapped_to_bead_id` by reading the prompt from `FileSystem::live_project_root(...)`. The engine otherwise resolves projects through `FileSystem::project_root(...)`, so audit-only/legacy workspaces will fail this read, produce an empty allowed-id set, and silently drop every planned-elsewhere mapping even when the prompt actually contains valid entries. Load the prompt through the same fallback root used elsewhere before fail-closing the mapping.

src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs:752-754 says `completion_round` exists to filter stale mappings, but src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2429-2510 ignores both `run_id` and `completion_round` and only deduplicates by `(active_bead_id, finding_summary, mapped_to_bead_id)`. If round 1 records `finding X -> bead-A` and a later round fixes that concern or remaps it, `load_planned_elsewhere_mappings()` still returns the superseded round-1 entry (and can even return both targets). The only latest-round filter is the ad hoc one in src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:744-753, so the persisted milestone state is stale for every other reader. Make the rebuild/read path apply run/round supersession, or emit an explicit superseded/tombstone event when a later round no longer accepts an earlier mapping.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 19 -> Plan and Implement
